---
title: "Courses"
subtitle: "Course hubs for notes, interactives, exercises and further reading."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-course-catalogue
    contents: "*/index.qmd"
    include:
      kind: course
    sort: "course-order asc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4
    fields: [title, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mn-courses-featured
    contents: resources
    include:
      featured: true
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-items: 4
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mn-courses-latest
    contents: resources
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Math Nomad course materials"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Each course will have a home of its own. Lecture notes, interactives, exercises and references stay together so that a student can follow the course without hunting across the website.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">COURSE DIRECTORY</p>

## Browse the courses

Choose a course to find its growing collection of notes, interactives, exercises, resources and useful links.

::: {#mn-course-catalogue}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">PINNED</p>

## Featured course resources

::: {#mn-courses-featured}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Latest course materials

Use the filter to search titles, descriptions and labels as this collection grows.

::: {#mn-courses-latest}
:::
:::
